rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use assign only for implementation-level output bindings with existing features or declared auxiliary variables
generic_rules: Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes are for assignments
Only reference identifiers visible in the current component scope
Place input assumptions and output guarantees in annex agree only when concrete bounds or visible relations are provided
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed in the model
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use assume/guarantee syntax with labeled expressions and assign syntax for output bindings
AGREE annex blocks are scoped to their owning component declaration
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Deadline or Period as AGREE variables
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters not exposed in model scope
Implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
